title: Abiodun Coker & Odume Festus Pays Last Respects to Ramon Nasir’s Mother - FinancialEDGE
description: United Bank for Africa (UBA) Plc team members, led by Ramon Nasir, Head of Media and External Relations, gathered to pay their last respects to his mother at her burial ceremony in Ado-Odo, Ogun State. html:
United Bank for Africa (UBA) Plc team members, led by Ramon Nasir, Head of Media and External Relations, gathered to pay their last respects to his mother at her burial ceremony in Ado-Odo, Ogun State.

Abiodun Coker, Team Member Media Relations, and Odume Festus, Editorial/Project Director of Financial Edge, were among those who attended the ceremony to show their support and condolences to Ramon Nasir and his family
